facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 1,108 reviews. At a cafe on a back lane in Cửa Lấp.

Nora's Cafe - Restaurant isn't on the main strip. It's down Hem Chua Ong, away from the tourist drag. That's exactly why the numbers hit different.

Over a thousand people went out of their way to leave a review. That's not luck. That's consistency.

Add this to your Phu Quoc list before everyone else does. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Down a back lane in Cửa Lấp. 1,108 reviews. Watch what comes out of this kitchen at Nora's Cafe - Restaurant and you'll understand every single one.
